ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "log_prob_0" REAL /* Log probability for class 0 */,
  "log_prob_1" REAL /* Log probability for class 1 */,
  "higher_prob" INTEGER /* Indicator for the class with higher probability (0 or 1) */,
  "label" INTEGER /* True label of the data point */,
  "calibrated" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the prediction is calibrated (1) or not (0) */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version that produced the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the calibration */,
  "confidence_interval_0" REAL /* Confidence interval for class 0 */,
  "confidence_interval_1" REAL /* Confidence interval for class 1 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "feature_vector" TEXT /* Feature vector representing the data point */,
  "true_label" INTEGER /* True label of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_results" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration result */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "calibrated_prob_0" REAL /* Calibrated probability for class 0 */,
  "calibrated_prob_1" REAL /* Calibrated probability for class 1 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calibration result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calibration result was last updated */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the calibration */,
  "confidence_interval_0" REAL /* Confidence interval for class 0 */,
  "confidence_interval_1" REAL /* Confidence interval for class 1 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_results_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the prediction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the model version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was released */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model version */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model output was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model output was last updated */,
  "output_description" TEXT /* Description of the model output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)
